grades.expectation: Response provides a structured checklist of pre-exchange items
grades.reason: Clear table format with checkboxes and organized sections for pre-exchange requirements

grades.expectation: Response mentions specific protocol stages or sections
grades.reason: Explicitly references Stage B and Stage C with specific paragraph numbers (para 11, 12, 9, 8, 4, 6)

grades.expectation: Response covers key items: searches currency, mortgage offer, deposit, insurance, signed contracts
grades.reason: All key items covered: searches (within 6 months), mortgage offer valid, deposit funds cleared, buildings insurance, contracts signed

grades.expectation: Response references the protocol as source (not just general best practice)
grades.reason: Explicitly states 'based on the Law Society Conveyancing Protocol' and includes protocol references throughout
